---
title: "Hazel (Corylus avellana)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Corylus*](/trees/genus/corylus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 170 — Hazel](../170.html) |  |
| [Tree 320 — Hazel](../320.html) |  |
| [Tree 366 — Hazel](../366.html) |  |
| [Tree 378 — Hazel](../378.html) |  |
| [Tree 385 — Hazel](../385.html) |  |
| [Tree 400 — Hazel](../400.html) |  |
